basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Principal, Professor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Principal Cum Professor and Vice Principal Cum Professor
basic_details.short_information: ESIC College Kolkata (ESIC) Principal Cum Professor and Vice Principal Cum Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website of Employees' State Insurance Corporation. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Principal Cum Professor and Vice Principal Cum Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 69 years.

qualification.details: Principal Cum Professor, Nursing College: M.Sc.(Nursing) from a recognized university having total 15 years' of experience with M.Sc.(Nursing) out of which 12 years in Collegiate program. Desirable: Ph.D.(Nursing) Professor cum Vice Principal, Nursing College: M.Sc.(Nursing) from a recognized university having total 13 years' of experience with M.Sc.(Nursing) out of which 10 years in Collegiate program. Desirable: Ph.D.(Nursing)

vacancy_details.Post Name: Professor cum Vice Principal, Nursing College

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 89780/- per month (Principal Cum Professor), Rs. 84420/- per month (Vice Principal Cum Professor)
salary_details.details: Principal Cum Professor: Rs. 89780/- per month Vice Principal Cum Professor: Rs. 84420/- per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Principal Cum Professor and Vice Principal Cum Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Principal Cum Professor and Vice Principal Cum Professor positions in ESIC College Kolkata.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. Nursing degree. A Ph.D. in Nursing is considered desirable for both posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced in this recruitment drive is 69 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Principal Cum Professor and Vice Principal Cum Professor roles?
faq.answer: The Principal Cum Professor will receive Rs. 89,780/- per month, while the Vice Principal Cum Professor will be paid Rs. 84,420/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on a Personal Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ESIC College Kolkata located?
faq.answer: ESIC College Kolkata is located in Kolkata, West Bengal, with the pincode 700104.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual, as indicated in the official notification.
